title: A Little Root Trouble
start_lines: Marigold? I am Sage. I keep the plant shop, mostly upright.
I hope I am not interrupting your first morning in the shop.
I have a tray of young roots that will not wake after being moved.
I know plants, but this feels like it wants a gentler sort of magic.
Could you make a Root-Wake Tonic for them?
reminder_lines: No hurry. The roots are sleeping stubbornly, but not dangerously.
Dewcap mushroom and glowberries should wake them gently.
complete_lines: That is exactly it. Soft magic, not too sharp.
Thank you, Marigold. You may have a good hand for green things.
Please take this seed packet, and a little gold for your time.

title: A Brighter Menu
start_lines: Marigold, yes? Camellia. I run the restaurant in town.
Sage mentioned your Root-Wake Tonic did exactly what it promised.
I am looking for something bright for the lunch menu. Gentle, not too sweet.
Could you brew a Glowberry Cordial for me?
reminder_lines: The cordial should be bright without shouting.
Moonleaf, glowberries, and forest water should keep it balanced.
complete_lines: There it is. Bright, clean, and kinder than the usual tavern punch.
This will do nicely. Thank you, Marigold.
Take this for the trouble. Keep the recipe; I suspect I will ask for it again.
